name: hb_5_8
requirements: As part of your analysis, for the source-receptor pair company 2418 -> station 179 over the period (full month 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-30 (original text says 06-31, an invalid date)), compute and store: distance_km, bearing_deg (company->station), station_mean_pm25, station_max_pm25 (float), station_exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), company_total_exhaust (float).

turns.query: Help me evaluate long-term environmental investment risks for residential properties near Monitoring Station (station_id: 179) considering pollution projections from nearby Hebei Yanshan Steel Group (company_id: 2418) during 2025-06-01 to 2025-06-31.
